decision.rationale: All 20 FRs defined, 17 ACs specified, 0 critical gaps, all 11 context files populated.

outputs.description: Primary architect input: 11-section prompt with FRs, ACs, assumptions, decisions
Full data flow diagram and rule dependency graph
File types, naming conventions, wildcard structure, config additions
Rule-by-rule containerization spec: before/after shell commands, container assignments
Container image sources (build-time); no runtime APIs
No user paths, no cluster-specific paths, shell safety
9 edge cases: empty submodule, STAR intermediates, picard wrapper, jacusa2 no wildcards, etc.
Full 17-AC list plus resource defaults table per rule
Snakemake 9+, apptainer SDM, TSCC profile, bind mounts, no-change list
File paths, container_for() pattern, shell before/after for each rule, tool install paths

key_findings: 14 rules total need container:/log:/resources: directives (3 preprocessing + 6 tools + 5 downstream)
5 existing containers reusable: picard, reditools, sprint, wgs, jacusa2
4 new Dockerfiles needed: star, red_ml, fastx, morales_downstream
config.yaml needs: singularity_image_dir, containers block, downstream_scripts_dir; remove tools section
bcftools AND star_mapping both need set -euo pipefail (2 rules, not just 1)
jacusa2 and all downstream rules have no wildcards — log paths use rule names only
mark_duplicates must call picard wrapper, not java -jar
next_stage_context: Architect should decompose into ~8 tasks: (1) Snakefile header additions, (2) config.yaml changes, (3) preprocessing.smk containerization, (4) tools.smk containerization, (5) downstream.smk containerization, (6) containers/star/ Dockerfile, (7) containers/red_ml/ Dockerfile, (8) containers/fastx/ + containers/morales_downstream/ Dockerfiles. Tasks 1-5 are sequential (depend on each other); tasks 6-8 are independent and can be done in parallel.
